state_entry.description: Called when the script enters a state

state_exit.description: Called when the script exits a state

touch_start.description: Called when an avatar starts touching the object

touch.description: Called repeatedly while an avatar is touching the object

touch_end.description: Called when an avatar stops touching the object

on_rez.description: Called when the object is rezzed

changed.description: Called when the object changes (owner, region, inventory, etc.)

timer.description: Called each time the timer fires

body: listen(integer channel, string name, key id, string message)
listen.description: Called when the object hears a chat message on a listened channel

attach.description: Called when the object is attached or detached

dataserver.description: Called when data is received from a dataserver request

run_time_permissions.description: Called when the agent responds to a permission request

sensor.description: Called when the sensor detects objects/agents

no_sensor.description: Called when the sensor detects nothing

collision_start.description: Called when another object starts colliding with this object

collision.description: Called repeatedly while another object is colliding with this object

body: control(key id, integer level, integer edge)
control.description: Called when an agent sends control inputs

money.description: Called when the object receives L$

body: email(string time, string address, string subj, string message, integer num_left)
email.description: Called when the object receives an email

body: http_response(key request_id, integer status, list metadata, string body)
http_response.description: Called when an HTTP response is received
